name: northwood-web-ui-load-test
description: Web-UI execution of the concurrent load test (docs/concurrent-load-test.md §5) — Playwright drives N concurrent, distinct-OIDC-user browser sessions through the real erp-web-ui SPA -> BFF -> services path, asserting session isolation + distinct created_by. The conservation invariants are the shared Java InvariantVerifier (load-test module).
